title: Grainger Names Matt Fortin as Chief Human Resources Officer
text: CHICAGO , Sept. 12, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Grainger (NYSE: GWW), the leading broad line distributor of maintenance, repair and operating (MRO) products serving businesses and institutions, today announced the appointment of Matt Fortin as Senior Vice President and Chief Human Resources Officer, effective Wednesday, September 13, 2023.

title: 4 Industrial Services Stocks Countering Industry Headwinds
text: The ongoing weakness in order levels mars the near-term outlook for the Zacks Industrial Services industry. The likes of GWW, MSM, HI and BOOM will gain from their heightened focus on enhancing digital capabilities.
